name: Wilderness house
description: If you wanted to live off the land and make use of roleplaying grounded from a house you could do anything in this magical suburban house in any forest that I'm calling Basil. Let me know if you suggest names, if this would. You could make your own. I used OpenArt.Ai to get this picture. This house can fit for one or a coupled pair of average humans.
creator: Gloriam
